_notes.pages: Each page = one View Template + one data source. Templates: 'calendar' (iCal-backed), 'card' (Vikunja Card View), 'pseudo_gantt' (Vikunja Project View), 'kanban' (Vikunja Kanban View — each subproject is a row showing its own kanban buckets as swimlanes; row width scales with the project's lane count up to a cap; an empty lane with no tasks in any preceding lane reads 'Completed'). You can add multiple pages per template. Pages render and rotate in array order.
_notes.page.id: Stable identifier used for rotation order + tweaks. Optional; auto-generated if omitted.
_notes.page.name: Overrides the page title. If omitted, the Vikunja project name is used (calendar defaults to 'Calendar').
_notes.card_and_pseudo_gantt_source: Set 'vikunja_project_id' to the Vikunja project whose SUBPROJECTS populate the view. Card View = one card per subproject (tasks listed, completed/total counted). Project View = first subproject's tasks define the columns; every subproject is a row with cells aligned by task position showing completion. For an offline demo, use 'local_json' instead (projects.json / capabilities.json).
_notes.calendar_source: Set 'ical_urls' (list of strings or {url, category, color, name} objects). category 1-5 controls event color: 1=Sync 2=Review 3=External 4=Field 5=Offsite. Optionally set 'color' (any CSS color, e.g. '#e8c547' or 'oklch(0.72 0.16 320)') and 'name' (legend label) on a source to override the category color/label for that calendar. Falls back to top-level 'ical_urls' if omitted.
_notes.vikunja: base_url is the Vikunja host root (no /api/v1). Provide an API token via 'token' or, preferably, leave it blank and set the env var named by 'token_env'.
_notes.lyteworks: base_url is the Course Architect / Lyteworks host root (no /api). 'token' is optional (left blank if the instance has no auth). A 'lyteworks' page needs 'lyteworks_course_id'. The view shows one row per module; each of the 5 production phases shows decks-complete / total decks, color-coded (green=all, amber=partial, grey=none). By default a lecture with no slide deck counts as one incomplete deck toward the totals; set 'deckless_lesson_types' (comma-separated list of lesson_type values, e.g. 'lecture,workshop') on the page or under the global 'lyteworks' block to restrict that — only deckless lectures whose lesson_type is in the list are counted; all other deckless lectures are ignored.
_notes.countdown_target: ISO 8601 date string, e.g. '2026-12-31'. Leave empty to hide the countdown on Project View. A page may override with its own 'countdown' object.
_notes.reload_interval_seconds: How often the background thread refreshes all sources. The UI 'Reload' button forces an immediate refresh regardless.
